Drag me around — buddies stand on my top edge and ride along.

Grab a buddy and throw it. Poke the Live2D girl. Right-click (or tap start) for the engine menu.

BuddyEngine web demo — every buddy runs sandboxed in a null-origin iframe cell — one shared PhysX (WASM) world, one three.js scene — this window is a physics platform
